name: json-render
description: Render JSON / JSONL as rich UI (tree / table / form / chart / card) with two-way editing.

commands.title: JSON Render: Start Mock Server (for testing)

editor/title.when: !activeWebviewPanelId && (resourceLangId == json || resourceLangId == jsonc || resourceLangId == jsonl || resourceLangId == ndjson || resourceExtname == .jsonl || resourceExtname == .ndjson)

explorer/context.when: resourceLangId == json || resourceLangId == jsonc || resourceLangId == jsonl || resourceLangId == ndjson

commandPalette.when: resourceLangId == json || resourceLangId == jsonc || resourceLangId == jsonl || resourceLangId == ndjson

jsonRender.defaultView.description: View mode. 'auto' picks the best view from data shape; any other value overrides the auto decision.

jsonRender.autoSync.description: Automatically sync edits from preview back to the source file.

jsonRender.autoSave.description: After syncing edits, also save the source file to disk automatically. Disable if you want to review the dirty document manually (Cmd/Ctrl+S).

jsonRender.enableMockServer.description: Start a local mock HTTP server on http://127.0.0.1:39870 (endpoints: /echo /slow /fail /upload) for offline testing of __form.submit. Recommended to enable only during development.
